---
title: "Jacob Armitage"
subtitle: "Population Health Scientist"
# `profile.jpg` photo by Reed Geiger on https://unsplash.com
image: profile_website.jpg
image-alt: "Sky replacement of a mountain in the olympics"
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Kovshei
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jacob-armitage-5b2029158
---

Jacob Armitage is an Epidemiologist interested in Population Health Science, Demography, and their interactions with the Climate Crisis.

## Education

**University of Washington** - M.S. Genetic Epidemiology \| June 2023

**Rutgers University** - B.S. Biotechnology \| May 2020

## Experience

**Assessment and Evaluation Epidemiologist**  - Thurston County Public Health and Social Services \| March 2025 - Current

**Research Coordinator** - Seattle Epidemiological Research and Information Center, Department of Veterans Affairs \| May 2024 - March 2025

**Graduate Teaching Assistant** - University of Washington Institute for Public Health Genetics \| March 2023 - June 2023

**Graduate Research Assistant** - University of Washington Population Health Initiative \| June 2022 - Dec 2022

**Molecular Biologist - Sequencing Core** - Delaware Department of Health and Social Services \| July 2020 - July 2021
